_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Alembic PENDING Sentinel — make migration late-binding explicit

steps.description: Create scripts/rewrite_down_revision.py (rewrites a migration file's down_revision to the PENDING sentinel) and add the migration-pending Makefile target (wraps alembic revision --autogenerate + calls the script). TDD: write tests/unit/test_rewrite_down_revision.py first (6 cases: hex rewrite, None rewrite, type-annotated form, idempotency, no-down_revision error, missing-file error). Run targeted tests only.

Create scripts/resolve_pending_migration.py (scans versions dir, computes real chain head, rewrites PENDING in-place; writes 'None' UNQUOTED for chain-root case, quoted hex otherwise). Update make migration-check to call resolver before pytest. Add documentation comment to orch/daemon/migration_rebase.py Step 8 (no logic change). TDD: extend tests/unit/daemon/test_migration_rebase.py with PENDING sentinel test; new tests/unit/test_resolve_pending_migration.py (4 cases, test 3 asserts unquoted None); extend tests/integration/test_migrations_round_trip.py with two new tests — resolver produces valid chain, AC4 no-op-on-clean-versions guard. Run targeted tests only.

Review S01 (rewrite script, migration-pending target, unit tests) and S02 (resolver script, Makefile update, migration_rebase.py comment, test extensions). Pre-review lint+format gate. Check: idempotency of rewrite script, stdlib-only imports, head-computation excludes PENDING files, AC4 regression guard, tdd_red_evidence plausibility in both step reports.

Documentation only — no production code. Add PENDING convention rule to CLAUDE.md and orch/CLAUDE.md. Insert PENDING convention blockquote into migration sections of skills/iw-new-cr/SKILL.md, skills/iw-new-feature/SKILL.md, skills/iw-new-incident/SKILL.md. Add migration-pending note to ai-dev/templates/Implementation_Prompt_Template.md. Run iw sync-skills and commit both master and mirror copies.

Global cross-step review. Verify all 6 ACs: migration-pending target, migration-check resolver, migration_rebase.py PENDING path, no regression on real migrations, idempotency, documentation coverage. Run targeted pytest across all new/modified test files. Verify .claude/skills/ mirrors match skills/ master copies. Flag any S03 CRITICAL/HIGH findings still open.
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check (now with PENDING pre-resolver)
QV: Linting (ruff + node template check + Jinja2 % format check)
QV: Unit tests (includes new rewrite and resolver unit tests)
QV: Integration tests (includes migration round-trip with PENDING resolver)

Self-assessment via iw-item-analyze skill. Focus: resolver head-computation correctness, skills mirror consistency, AC4 regression check (migration-check clean for existing chains), tdd_red_evidence quality in S01 and S02.
